analysis.primary_subject: Custom built-in wardrobe with open shelving and drawer units

craftsmanship_quality.precision: Medium - The alignment of the panels and doors is fairly straight, but some minor gaps are visible.
craftsmanship_quality.surface_quality: Medium - The plywood surfaces are smooth but show some minor imperfections and tool marks.
craftsmanship_quality.attention_to_detail: Medium - The shelving and drawer units are well-aligned, but some finishing touches are still needed.

portfolio_presentation.accompanying_text: This image showcases a custom-built wardrobe in the assembly stage, featuring open shelving and drawer units. The use of plywood and MDF provides a sturdy and modern look, with attention to modular design for easy assembly.
